name: instagram-shopify-leads-scraper
title: Instagram Shopify Leads Scraper
description: Type a niche like "skincare" and get a ready-to-use lead list: Instagram brands that sell online, their store links (Shopify verified), public emails and phones, follower and engagement stats, and a 0-100 lead score. One clean row per business, ready to export to CSV, Excel, or JSON for outreach.
